description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this black handbag from yelloe comes with a leather-look upper and a spacious inner to hold your party essentials.Height: 33 cmWidth: 42 cmDepth: 15 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one zippered compartment with one inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentialsTwo short straps for carrying ease and styleEnvelope structured shape on the front and at the backBranding embossed on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
